title: Data Entry Keyers
description: Operate data entry device, such as keyboard or photo composing perforator. Duties may include verifying data and preparing materials for printing.

tasks.text: Locate and correct data entry errors, or report them to supervisors.
tasks.rationale: Routine cognitive or manual task with high vulnerability to automation.

tasks.text: Compile, sort, and verify the accuracy of data before it is entered.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Compare data with source documents, or re-enter data in verification format to detect errors.
tasks.rationale: Routine cognitive or manual task with high vulnerability to automation.

tasks.text: Store completed documents in appropriate locations.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Select materials needed to complete work assignments.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Read source documents such as canceled checks, sales reports, or bills, and enter data in specific data fields or onto tapes or disks for subsequent entry, using keyboards or scanners.
tasks.rationale: Routine cognitive or manual task with high vulnerability to automation.

tasks.text: Maintain logs of activities and completed work.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Load machines with required input or output media, such as paper, cards, disks, tape, or Braille media.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Resolve garbled or indecipherable messages, using cryptographic procedures and equipment.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.
